C

changeLevelAndGetWord(int) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.WordController
Changes level and returns a new word.
checkLevelUp() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.LevelController
Checks if the player meets the conditions to level up.
